evidence: CAUSAL CHAIN: login succeeded before test start, then page.goto failed. Root cause: invalid direct navigation to session-dependent screen (not ENV). Secondary cause: APP_POOL_CRASH_AFTER_INVALID_NAVIGATION.
next_action: Usar nav_path humano (open_from_busqueda) o deeplink gobernado para 'la pantalla afectada'. NO usar page.goto() directo a pantallas session-dependientes. Revisar navigation_contracts.yml y navigation_contract_validation.json.
